mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aid_application ( applicant_id, applicant_name, animal_id, animal_name, aid_type, aid_amount, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{animalId}, #{animalName}, #{aidType}, #{aidAmount}, #{reason}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE aid_application
applicant_id = #{applicantId},
applicant_name = #{applicantName},
animal_id = #{animalId},
animal_name = #{animalName},
aid_type = #{aidType},
aid_amount = #{aidAmount},
reason = #{reason},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE aid_application SET status = #{status}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, auditor_name = #{auditorName} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, applicant_id AS applicantId, applicant_name AS applicantName, animal_id AS animalId, animal_name AS animalName, aid_type AS aidType, aid_amount AS aidAmount, reason, status, audit_time AS auditTime, auditor_id AS auditorId, auditor_name AS auditorName, is_deleted AS isDeleted, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM aid_application WHERE id = #{id}
